default_note: No specific market notes available; conduct standard due diligence on import regulations, certification requirements, and local distribution channels.

market_notes.usa: Consider FDA/CPSC compliance if applicable, and factor in state-level sales tax variability.
market_notes.eu: Ensure CE marking compliance where applicable, and account for VAT registration requirements.
market_notes.japan: Local certification (e.g. PSE, JIS) may be required; consider working with a local distributor.
market_notes.india: Review GST implications and consider the India-UAE or India-Japan CEPA agreements if relevant.
market_notes.uae: Free zones like JAFZA may offer duty advantages; verify re-export rules if using UAE as a hub.
market_notes.uk: Confirm UKCA marking requirements and check post-Brexit trade agreement eligibility.
market_notes.australia: Verify labelling requirements and consider the India-Australia ECTA if shipping from India.
